title: Remove Loan Section Letter document type

requirements.text: Remove the 'Loan Section Letter' document type from the list of available document types in the frontend. It should no longer appear as an option in the document type selector in FormSection, and its built-in template definition should be removed from getTemplate.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: 'Loan Section Letter' no longer appears in the document type dropdown/selector in FormSection
The built-in template definition for Loan Section Letter is removed from frontend/src/lib/templates/getTemplate.ts
The LoanType or DocumentType enum/union in frontend/src/types/form.ts no longer includes the Loan Section Letter entry
No runtime errors occur when the application loads or when other document types are selected

requirements.text: Remove the 'Loan Section Letter' loan type from the backend's LoanType definition in backend/main.mo to keep the data model consistent with the frontend changes.
acceptanceCriteria: The LoanType variant in backend/main.mo no longer includes a Loan Section Letter case
Existing CRUD functions compile and operate correctly without the removed type

constraints: Do not remove or modify any other document types (e.g., GST Letter or other remaining loan types)
Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Modifying the watermark or template designer functionality
Changes to authentication or identity logic
